title: BarkinMad Coins in ZXBrick
description: Earn BarkinMad Coins as you play ZXBrick and unlock cosmetic rewards across supported ZX Series games.
summary: BarkinMad Coins reward regular play and can be used to unlock cosmetic content across the ZX Series.
heroImageAlt: BarkinMad Coins shared ZX Series rewards

sections.heading: What Are BarkinMad Coins?
paragraphs: BarkinMad Coins are the shared reward system used across supported ZX Series games.
As you play ZXBrick, you'll earn coins that can be used to unlock cosmetic rewards across the wider ZX Series.

sections.heading: Earn Rewards as You Play
paragraphs: Every game brings you one step closer to your next reward. Collecting BarkinMad Coins gives you an extra reason to keep playing while working towards achievements, high scores, and leaderboard positions.
Coins reward regular play without changing the core arcade gameplay, making progression feel rewarding while keeping every game fair.

faq.question: Do BarkinMad Coins have any real-world value?
faq.answer: No. BarkinMad Coins are an in-game reward used to unlock cosmetic content across supported ZX Series games. They have no cash value and cannot be exchanged for real money.

featureShowcases.heading: Play, Earn, Unlock
featureShowcases.summary: BarkinMad Coins reward regular play and unlock cosmetic content across the ZX Series.
body: Every game of ZXBrick helps you earn BarkinMad Coins, giving you another reason to keep improving your skills and returning for another round.
Combined with achievements and leaderboards, BarkinMad Coins create a shared progression system that connects every supported ZX Series game.
bullets: Unlock cosmetic rewards across the ZX Series.

image.caption: Earn rewards every time you play.
